description_long: This object appears to be a heavily worn or damaged cabinet or shelf, with a rectangular base and multiple vertical compartments or dividers. The exterior is primarily a dark brown color, resembling aged or painted wood, with some areas showing lighter, possibly chipped or weathered surfaces. The top surface is uneven and jagged, suggesting significant wear, breakage, or missing panels. The front and back sides reveal several open compartments or cavities, some of which contain irregular, rounded forms that may be remnants of shelves or internal supports. The sides are partially collapsed or bent outward, exposing the interior structure and giving the object a rough, unfinished appearance. Overall, the cabinet or shelf looks neglected, possibly salvaged from an outdoor or industrial urban environment.
description: A battered, dark brown cabinet or shelf with jagged edges, open compartments, and visible internal damage, resembling aged wood.
description_view_0: The front view shows a jagged, uneven top and a partially collapsed side, with some internal compartments visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the vertical dividers and the rectangular base, with the damaged top and open compartments more apparent.
description_view_2: The back view reveals several rounded, irregular forms inside the compartments and more extensive internal exposure.
description_view_3: This side view shows the opposite end, with more pronounced vertical gaps and a clearer view of the damaged structure.
